negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_126
prompt: The video opens with two women engaged in a stretching exercise outdoors at an outdoor gym. The woman on the left, dressed in a pink jacket and black leggings, is performing a high leg stretch, lifting her right leg straight up towards the sky. Her hair is tied back in a ponytail, and she smiles warmly at her companion. The woman on the right, wearing a gray hoodie and black leggings, assists by holding the raised leg steady with both hands, ensuring it remains straight. Her hair is also tied back in a ponytail, and she looks focused and supportive. The background features a dense green forest, indicating a park-like setting. The ground beneath them is covered with a dark, textured surface typical of outdoor exercise areas. In the distance, various pieces of black exercise equipment, including ladders and bars, are visible, suggesting this is a designated space for physical training. Throughout the video, the woman on the left continues to lift her leg higher, demonstrating increased flexibility and control. The woman on the right adjusts her grip slightly but remains steady, supporting the leg without any noticeable movement. The scene remains consistent, with both women focused on the stretching exercise, showcasing a dedicated and supportive interaction between them. By the final frame, the woman on the left has reached a higher position with her leg, indicating progress in the stretch, while the woman on the right continues to hold the leg firmly, ensuring safety and support. A medium shot captures their dynamic and supportive interaction.
